revision.comment: editors are pulling Wikidata to use for this template's parameters and often there is no date in Wikidata. This is considered "normal" so just return a blank when parameters 1, 2 and 3 are missing rather than an error. See [[Template:Start date and age/testcases#Empty/Missing parameters]]
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{#if: {{{1|}}}|{{#if: {{{2|}}}|{{#if: {{{3|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{yesno|{{{df|no}}}}}|yes|{{#expr:{{{3}}}}} {{MONTHNAME|{{{2}}}}}|{{MONTHNAME|{{{2}}}}} {{#expr:{{{3}}}}},}} {{{1}}}|{{MONTHNAME|{{{2}}}}} {{{1}}}}}|{{{1}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{yesno|{{{paren|{{{p|no}}}}}}}}|yes||;}}{{#ifeq:{{yesno|{{{br|no}}}}}|yes|
| }}{{#ifeq:{{yesno|{{{paren|{{{p|no}}}}}}}}|yes|(}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}|{{#if: {{{3|}}}|{{time ago|{{{1}}}-{{{2}}}-{{{3}}}|min_magnitude=days}}|{{years or months ago|{{{1}}}|{{#time:n|1-{{trim|{{{2}}}}}-1}}}}}}|{{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{1}}}}}|{{time ago|{{{1}}}|min_magnitude=days}}|{{years or months ago|{{{1}}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{yesno|{{{paren|{{{p|no}}}}}}}}|yes|)}}|{{#if: {{{2|}}}|{{Error|Error: first parameter is missing.|tag=span}}|{{#if: {{{3|}}}|{{Error|Error: first parameter is missing.|tag=span}} }} }}}} ({{#if: {{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}| -{{#time:m|1-{{trim|{{{2}}}}}-1}}{{#if: {{{3|}}}| -{{padleft:{{{3}}}|2|0}}}}}}}}) {{documentation}} [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Start date and age]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
